description: You are a postsecondary Cultural Studies professor preparing a comparative research project on digital rights policy. Configure Tor Browser for a multilingual research workflow by setting the 'intl.accept_languages' preference to 'es-ES, fr-FR, en-US'. Visit the Spanish Wikipedia article on digital rights (https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Derechos_digitales), the French Wikipedia article (https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Droits_num%C3%A9riques), and the EFF international digital rights issues page (https://www.eff.org/issues/international). Organize these resources into a bookmark folder named 'Digital Rights Research' using the following exact titles: 'Derechos Digitales - Wikipedia ES', 'Droits Numériques - Wikipedia FR', and 'EFF International Issues'. Ensure all pages are fully visited and correctly organized.
